full_text:
Lü Lingqi 呂玲綺
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lü Lingqi (呂玲綺). Lü Bu’s first daughter. Historic, but elaborated as Lü Lingqi by Koei. Lü Lingqi is a fictional character. Lü Lingqi was affiliated with Lü Bu. Lü Lingqi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
